meta.title: Track Your Shipment | aws overseas
meta.description: Track your international shipment using your tracking number. Download the aws overseas mobile app for real-time shipment updates, notifications, and complete shipment history.

hero.title: Track Your Shipment in Real Time
hero.subtitle: Stay informed throughout your shipping journey. Enter your tracking number below to begin tracking your cargo or continue with the aws overseas mobile app for a complete tracking experience.

trackingForm.title: Enter Tracking Number
trackingForm.description: Input the shipment tracking number provided by aws overseas.
trackingForm.validationMessage: Please enter a valid tracking number.

trackButton.title: Track Shipment
trackButton.description: Click below to verify your shipment status.

appCTA.title: Get the Complete Tracking Experience
appCTA.description: Download the aws overseas Mobile App to receive live shipment updates, push notifications, shipment history, document access, and payment management—all in one place.
